summary: iter233 testing complete. 18/18 backend tests passed. Frontend features verified: WeatherStrip at top (temp + icon + condition), EchoCommandBar hidden on /m/ecw routes (only Echo Mini Button visible), Echo button holding state (blue→teal, ⌘K→HOLD), Voice panel with time-aware greeting (no preloaded suggestions), Quick launch with Activity/Dashboard/P&L/Weather tiles, Dashboard with MTD P&L strip + resort occupancy, P&L view with real data (Revenue $551K, Food 21.95%, Labor 24.54%, Prime 46.49%), Weather view with current card + hourly rain tracker. Recipe detail Thomas Keller styling verified in code (cream bg, serif font, em-dashes, ornamental dots, two-column ingredients, numbered method, Chef's Note).
critical_code_review_comments: EchoCommandBar correctly hidden on /m/ecw routes via pathname check in useState initializer
Outlet auto-upgrade from outlet-main to first EchoAurium outlet works correctly (useEffect in EcwOpsStandalone.tsx)
Voice panel greeting is time-aware (morning/afternoon/evening) and personalized with 'William'
No preloaded suggestion buttons in voice panel (removed per iter233 spec)
Weather context injected into voice chat via _load_context_snapshot in echo_voice.py
Recipe detail Thomas Keller styling implemented with cream gradient bg (#f5efe4→#ebe2d1), Georgia serif font, em-dash station eyebrow, ornamental dots, two-column ingredients
test_credentials: X-User-Id: chef-william for backend. devAuth=1 query param for frontend auth bypass.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing EchoAurium P&L data for outlet-windows.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter233 features fully tested. Backend: GET /api/weather/current returns {current: {temp, feels_like, wind_speed, condition: {main, description}}, location}. GET /api/weather/rain-tracker returns {hours: [{hour, rain_probability, rain_mm, temp}], peak_hour}. POST /api/echo-voice/chat with weather question includes weather context in snapshot and may return panel='weather-hourly'. Frontend: WeatherStrip (data-testid='weather-strip') renders at top showing temp + icon + condition. EchoCommandBar hidden on /m/ecw routes (pathname check). Echo Mini Button (data-testid='echo-mini-btn') shows ⌘K normally, changes to 🎙HOLD with teal color during long-press. Voice panel (data-testid='echo-voice-panel') opens with time-aware greeting 'Good morning/afternoon/evening, William. How can I help?' - NO preloaded suggestion buttons. Quick launch tiles: Activity, Dashboard, P&L, Weather. Dashboard shows MTD P&L strip (revenue, food%, labor%, prime%) + resort occupancy (Occ, ADR, RevPAR). P&L view shows full GL breakdown with sections. Weather view shows current card + hourly rain tracker with 16 hours. Recipe detail (data-testid='recipe-detail-root') has Thomas Keller book styling: cream gradient bg, Georgia serif font, em-dash station eyebrow, ornamental dots, two-column ingredients, numbered method, Chef's Note box, SMS details tag. Note: Recipes only seeded for outlet-main, but auto-upgrade switches to outlet-windows which has no recipes - this is expected behavior.
